scope.question: extraction_refresh: No recent systematic-review or meta-analysis source has been screened into the knowledge base.

inputs.summary: Coordinator requested a bounded extraction-refresh repair for the senolytics review-landscape coverage gap.
Live job declared no context_pack_path and scoped writes to the coverage assessment and repair candidate.
Target gap stated that no recent systematic-review or meta-analysis source had been screened into the knowledge base.
Triage state queued the review-landscape coverage gap as a medium-priority extraction_refresh job.
Target coverage assessment was updated to preserve the unresolved review-landscape gap and record the blocker.
Runbook and extraction rules governed candidate ledger, source-snapshot, no-op search, and review-lane handling.
Agent-run output schemas constrained the final structured response.

outputs.summary: Submitted a partial repair candidate, updated the senolytics coverage assessment, and created durable research-session, search-log, and screening-run records documenting the blocked no-op review-landscape pass. No recent systematic-review or meta-analysis source was screened because no source row/context pack was supplied and PubMed/NLM retrieval was unavailable in the worker.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks the bounded self-healing repair candidate and required review-lane contract.
Refreshes the review-landscape category and gap text to preserve the unresolved systematic-review/meta-analysis screening gap and record the source-row/snapshot blocker.
Records the bounded extraction-refresh session and blocked outcome for the review-landscape gap.
Records the attempted PubMed review-landscape query and the worker-network blocker.
Records that no search hits could be screened into the knowledge base during this bounded pass.

npm run audit:agentic-process passed for 515 files.
npm run audit:codex-jobs passed for 71 job files.
npm run audit:exports failed because exports/latest/accepted-records.jsonl and exports/latest/audit-manifest.json are stale until post-run export_latest regenerates them.
Full verify:knowledge-base was not run because audit_exports is expected to fail before the coordinator post-run export step.
Final proposed_records paths match the candidate_change proposed_records ledger.
Worker emitted exactly one final JSON agent_run message, matched output_path, and avoided ad hoc schema-validation snippets.

blocking_issues: No context_pack_path or source row was supplied for a concrete recent systematic-review or meta-analysis candidate.
PubMed/NLM retrieval was unavailable from the worker environment, preventing source-snapshot-backed search, screening, and source creation.
No recent systematic-review or meta-analysis source was screened into the knowledge base; the review-landscape gap remains open.
exports/latest is stale until the coordinator post-run export_latest step runs.
next_actions: Run a network-enabled search and screening pass for recent senolytics systematic reviews, meta-analyses, trial reviews, and evidence maps.
Create or refresh PubMed source snapshots before upgrading any included review source beyond screened or triage-summary maturity.
Run the required extraction_fidelity, synthesis_boundary, and taxonomy_mapping review lanes for coverage-gap-senolytics-review-landscape-repair.
Do not promote the candidate until the source-snapshot-backed review-landscape gap is resolved and required reviews pass.
